prompt: Design a film festival poster by blending the mystical colors of the first image with the characters from the second, with the text: 'Cinema Through the Light'.
prompt_refined: Generate a film festival poster. The design should incorporate the vibrant, stained-glass light patterns and rich, ornate colors from image 1 as the primary visual theme. Centrally feature the two main human characters from image 2. The poster must prominently display the text: 'Cinema Through the Light'.
objects: Two main human characters, centrally featured
Text: 'Cinema Through the Light', prominently displayed
